title: Savory Zanzibari Squash Stir-fry
description: A fresh and tender Australian dish featuring galangal, a unique ingredient that adds a unique Asian flavor to this whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: galangal
ingredients.notes: or use ginger if galangal is not available

instructions: Marinate the squash in soy sauce for at least an hour.
Preheat sous-vide to 180°F (75°C) and cook the marinated squash until tender, about 30-45 minutes.
Once cooked, remove from sous-vide machine and let it cool slightly. Slice into thin rounds.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced galangal to the hot oil and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced squash and red pepper flakes, if using, and cook for another minute.
Stir in garlic and continue cooking until the squash is heated through, approximately 3-4 more minutes.
Season with salt to taste before serving.
